title: Settings
hideAmountsDescription: Hide all amounts for shoulder-surfing protection
localOnlyDescription: No sync. Data lives on this device only.
deleteAllDataMessage: This permanently deletes all local budget data from this device. There is no undo.
encryptionNotEnabled: End-to-end encryption is not enabled. Any data on the server is protected by the server password, but the server owners can read it. Enable encryption to add an extra layer of protection with a password only you know.
encryptionEnabled: End-to-end encryption is enabled. Your data is encrypted before syncing. Local data remains unencrypted so if you forget your password you can re-encrypt with a new key.
disconnectMessage: Disconnect from this server? Local data will be cleared.
customSymbolHint: Custom Symbol overrides the default symbol for display. Leave empty to use the standard symbol.
experimentalFeaturesWarning: These features are still in development. They may be unstable or cause data issues. They are synced across all your devices. Use with caution.
deleteBudgetConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
enableCloudSyncMessage: Upload this budget to the server and enable syncing across devices?
stopSyncingMessage: This will keep the budget on this device but stop syncing with the server. You can enable sync again later.
noServerConfigured: Connect to a server to enable cloud sync.
connectToServerDescription: Sign in to sync budgets across devices
locationServicesDescription: Suggests payees near you when adding a transaction
locationPermissionMessage: To show nearby payees, go to Settings and allow location access for Actual.
